37.reason: [If p->lc is NULL, calling search(p->lc) leads to dereferencing a NULL pointer, causing runtime error (segmentation fault).]

51.reason: [Resetting k to 1 after each insertion breaks height tracking. Height should accumulate during recursive descent, not reset globally per insertion.]
